case_title: ADAM LAWRENCE HUBER VS. MICHAEL IACUESSA

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR STRIKING OF FILING AFTER APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES WAS DENIED. (DATE <LISTED BELOW> SOLELY FOR THE PURPOSES OF STRIKING FILING) HEARING SET FOR FEB-03-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HUBER, ADAM LAWRENCE AS TO DEFENDANT IACUESSA, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF ADAM LAWRENCE HUBER ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.

ORDER (FW-008) - ON COURT FEE WAIVER AF HEARING (SUPERIOR COURT). THE COURT DENIES YOUR REQUEST AND WILL NOT WAIVE OR REDUCE YOUR FEES AND COSTS. THE REASON FOR THIS DENIAL IS AS FOLLOWS: YOU DID NOT GO TO COURT ON THE HEARING DATE TO PROVIDE THE INFORMATION THE COURT NEEDED TO MAKE A DECISION. YOU HAVE 10 DAYS AFTER THE CLERK GIVES NOTICE OF THIS ORDER TO PAY YOUR FEES AS ORDERED.

THE COURT NEEDS MORE INFORMATION TO DECIDE WHETHER TO GRANT YOUR REQUEST.YOU MUST GO TO COURT ON THE DATE BELOW. THE HEARING WILL BE ABOUT:INCOME FOR PAST 4 MONTHS I.E. OCTOBER 2013 THROUGH DATE OF HEARING & EMPLOYMENT STATUS.BRING THE FOLLOWING PROOF TO SUPPORT YOUR REEQUEST IF REASONABLY AVAILABLE:ANY DOCUMENTS SUPPORTING YOUR REQUEST FOR FEE WAIVER & ANY DOCUMENTS REFLECTING YOUR INCOME FROM OCTOBER 2013 THROUGH THE DATE OF THE HEARING.

THE HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES OF JAN-16-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE(S). NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF FOR HEARING ON THE WAIVER OF COURT FEES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR REVIEW) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUBER, ADAM LAWRENCE
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AS TO PLAINTIFF HUBER, ADAM LAWRENCE HEARING SET FOR JAN-16-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR, CLAIM AND ORDER WAS STRIKEN ON FEB-18-2014.
